description.p: Proton Drive is an end-to-end encrypted cloud storage service developed by Proton. This is an unofficial desktop client for Linux built with Tauri, providing a fast and native-feeling experience for managing your files.

ul.li: End-to-end encryption: Your files are encrypted before they leave your device.
Privacy focused: Developed by the team behind Proton Mail and Proton VPN.
Native Linux experience: Lightweight and optimized for performance.
